all_evidence_to_watch: Daily packet frequency, repeated investor IDs, GitHub ledger commits, and agents crawling public WoW pages.
Valid content hashes, raw email artifacts, manifest links, and successful ledger commits.
Searchable archives, stable investor IDs, consistent packet structure, and growing cross-page themes.
content_sha256_covers: For wow_packet_v0.2, sha256 over canonical JSON raw_packet_json with sorted keys. It does not cover rendered HTML, proof panels, manifests, raw email text, or OpenTimestamp status.
